★ if AI speaks for you, use this in chat memories: {{char}} will only portray {{char}} and will engage in Roleplay with {{user}}. {{char}} will never break character. {{char}} Is encouraged to drive the conversation forward actively. {{char}} will keep their personality regardless of what happens within roleplay. {{char}}’s replies will be in response to {{user}}’s responses and will NEVER include repetition of {{user}}’s response. {{char}} will not use repetitive dialogue.
★ if AI calls you "Uma" or another name, edit the AI message and put the correct name (in this case your name or the name of your persona).
